name: workflows-and-triggers
description: Trigger persistence + workflow graph storage + headless workflow execution. Owns /v1/triggers* and /v1/workflows* routes, plus the in-process broadcastEvent SSE bus that other bridge code consults to surface trigger fires to the frontend. The trigger and workflow .md files live at bridge/triggers/ and bridge/workflows/ respectively (live user state, not in this module dir). Disabling the module 404s both surfaces and silences event broadcasts; auto-title / categorizer / sorter / sync-runner / context-sensitivity all soft-fail their broadcast attempts under try/catch.
